title: HudCraft
description: HudCraft is a lightweight resource pack that improves HUD visibility by using transparent UI elements and subtle item tweaks. Designed to be used alongside vanilla or any other resource pack.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c340d4b1b9b4e900312da54c82f4423c85d618d6.jpeg)

HudCraft is a minimalist resource pack focused on enhancing the Minecraft user interface without altering the core visual style of the game.

The main goal of this pack is to improve visibility and comfort by making the HUD cleaner and more readable while staying compatible with other texture packs.

## ✨ Features

- Transparent HUD backgrounds for a clearer screen
- Improved visibility of UI elements (inventory, hotbar, menus)
- Minor item texture adjustments for consistency and readability
- Keeps the vanilla look and proportions

## 🧩 Compatibility

- Designed to work on top of vanilla Minecraft
- Can be combined with any other texture pack
- Ideal as an overlay pack for PvP, Survival, or general gameplay

## 🎮 Who is this pack for?

- Players who want a cleaner interface
- PvP players who need better screen visibility
- Anyone who prefers minimal UI changes without touching world textures


HudCraft does not replace full texture packs — it enhances your interface while letting you keep your favorite visuals.

## Pack overview
